key.name: filter-junk
key.description: Whether SamRewritten should filter junk items.

key.name: app-theme
key.description: The preferred color scheme for the application. Valid values are 'system', 'light', and 'dark'.

key.name: app-sort
key.description: How the app list is sorted. Valid values are 'app_id', 'alphabetical', 'last_played', and 'playtime'.

key.name: disable-animations
key.description: Whether to disable card hover animations in the app list.
